input.user_input: What confidentiality obligations does the receiving party have under this NDA, and how long do they last?

actual:
I cannot answer your question because you have not provided or uploaded the NDA. 

Please upload the document or paste its text here. Once you provide the NDA, I will review it and identify the specific confidentiality obligations it imposes on the receiving party, as well as the exact duration of those obligations. 

*(For context, NDAs typically require the receiving party to hold the information in strict confidence, use it only for a specified permitted purpose, and restrict access to employees or agents on a need-to-know basis. The duration of these obligations usually ranges from one to five years, though obligations regarding trade secrets often last indefinitely. However, I need to see your specific agreement to tell you exactly what it requires.)*
